reviewPolicy: Live provider data may create candidate artifacts, but only artifacts in this reviewed file are compiled into the game.

cases.reviewNotes: Built from the CourtListener Rule 12 candidate lane and federal statutory jurisdiction source checks; facts are fictionalized for classroom use.
cases.title: Screening Report Pleading Fight
cases.venueFacts: The job application, screening notice, and alleged denial occurred in New York.
cases.summary: An applicant brings a federal screening-report claim, but the complaint is thin on notice and causation facts.

defendants.name: ScreeningCo Data
defendants.role: Prepared and sold the disputed screening report into New York.

defendants.name: Hudson Hiring LLC
defendants.role: Local employer alleged to have used the report in the hiring decision.

defendants.name: Lone Star Data Vendor
defendants.role: Upstream data broker with no New York-facing contract in the case file.

evidence.title: Screening report file
evidence.description: Request the report, notice packets, and audit trail.

evidence.title: Hiring manager deposition
evidence.description: Tie the report to the adverse hiring decision.

evidence.title: Notice admission
evidence.description: Narrow whether statutory notice was sent before the decision.

cases.reviewNotes: Built from federal removal/statutory source checks and state-expansion metadata; facts are fictionalized for classroom use.
cases.title: Repair Shop Removal Trap
cases.venueFacts: The repair, billing, and vehicle failure all happened in New Jersey.
cases.summary: A vehicle owner sues a national warranty company and a local repair shop after a failed repair and disputed warranty denial.

defendants.name: WarrantyCo National
defendants.role: Administered warranty claims and authorized repairs nationwide, including New Jersey.

defendants.name: Shoreline Repair LLC
defendants.role: Local repair shop that performed the disputed work.

defendants.name: Buckeye Parts Supply
defendants.role: Parts supplier with no direct New Jersey customer relationship in the case file.

evidence.title: Repair invoices and warranty notes
evidence.description: Collect claim notes, authorization records, and repair invoices.

evidence.title: Shop manager deposition
evidence.description: Test the relationship between the local shop and warranty administrator.

evidence.title: Mechanical expert report
evidence.description: Connect the failed repair to causation and amount in controversy.

doctrineCards.title: CourtListener Rule 12 Candidate Lane
doctrineCards.summary: CourtListener searches are used to find motion-to-dismiss patterns that can be fictionalized into pleading-sufficiency game cases.

doctrineCards.title: Removal and Diversity Source Lane
doctrineCards.summary: govinfo source probes support statutory source checks for diversity, removal, and remand cards before reviewed cases enter the deck.

doctrineCards.title: State Expansion Candidate Lane
doctrineCards.summary: Open States metadata is treated as an expansion source for state-law and state-procedure modules, not as direct legal authority for federal Civ Pro rules.

sourceCards.label: Reviewed Artifact: Rule 12 Candidate Lane
sourceCards.note: Reviewed source lane for fictionalized pleading-sufficiency game cases derived from CourtListener candidates.

sourceCards.label: Reviewed Artifact: Removal Source Lane
sourceCards.note: Reviewed source lane for federal removal and diversity gameplay artifacts.

sourceCards.label: Reviewed Artifact: State Expansion Lane
sourceCards.note: Reviewed source lane for later state-law and state-procedure expansion artifacts.
